sectors.name: Federal Government
sectors.description: Elected officials, senior staff, and power brokers shaping national policy.

people.name: Margaret Ellison
people.title: Senior Policy Advisor, White House
people.bio: Two-decade veteran of Capitol Hill staffing, now shaping the administration's domestic agenda. Known for building coalitions across party lines.

people.name: Senator Thomas Kade
people.title: U.S. Senator, Appropriations Committee Chair
people.bio: Controls the purse strings for major federal spending bills. A key swing vote courted by both parties.

people.name: Dana Reyes
people.title: Chief of Staff, Department of Commerce
people.bio: Former management consultant turned government operator, credited with modernizing the department's tech policy shop.

people.name: General Walter Iverson (Ret.)
people.title: National Security Council Advisor
people.bio: Retired four-star general who now shapes defense and foreign policy strategy from inside the West Wing.

sectors.name: Finance
sectors.description: Bank executives, hedge fund managers, and regulators who move capital markets.

people.name: Richard Voss
people.title: CEO, Meridian Capital Group
people.bio: Runs one of the largest private equity firms in the country, with a reputation for aggressive but disciplined dealmaking.

people.name: Elena Marchetti
people.title: Chair, Federal Reserve Regional Bank
people.bio: Sets interest rate policy recommendations and is a frequent voice in national economic debates.

people.name: Marcus Webb
people.title: Founder, Northbridge Hedge Fund
people.bio: Built a multi-billion dollar fund from scratch; known for high-conviction macro bets and a small, secretive inner circle.

people.name: Priya Chandrasekaran
people.title: Managing Partner, Vantage Ventures
people.bio: Top venture investor who sits on the boards of several unicorn startups and bridges finance with tech.

sectors.name: Technology
sectors.description: Founders, investors, and executives steering the direction of the tech industry.

people.name: Adrian Cho
people.title: CEO, Nimbus AI
people.bio: Founded one of the leading frontier AI labs after a career at two major tech giants. Sets the pace for the industry's AI roadmap.

people.name: Sasha Kowalski
people.title: General Partner, Ridgeline Ventures
people.bio: Early backer of three unicorns, now one of the most sought-after board members in Silicon Valley.

people.name: Devon Okafor
people.title: CTO, Helix Systems
people.bio: Architect behind several widely adopted open-source infrastructure projects; quietly influential among engineering leadership.

people.name: Naomi Fischer
people.title: Founder & CEO, Fischer Robotics
people.bio: Serial entrepreneur pushing autonomous systems into manufacturing; frequently advises federal tech policy committees.

sectors.name: Media
sectors.description: Network executives, publishers, and platform owners shaping the national narrative.

sectors.name: Energy
sectors.description: Oil, gas, and renewable energy executives with outsized influence over policy and markets.

sectors.name: Defense
sectors.description: Contractors, Pentagon officials, and intelligence community leaders.
